metadata.name: manufacturing_nl2sql_few_shot
metadata.description: Few-shot examples for lightweight NL2SQL system on manufacturing/supply-chain schema.
metadata.usage: Retrieve 1-3 examples by difficulty, intent_tags and pattern before SQL generation.
hard_rules: Only generate executable SQLite SELECT SQL.
Use only tables and columns provided by schema retrieval.
Date keys are stored as YYYYMMDD text, month keys as YYYYMM.
When using two fact tables in one query, aggregate each fact table to the common business grain before joining.
When question contains 每个/各/分别 + ranking/topN, use ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY ...).
For 有效订单, join code_sales_order_status and filter is_valid_order = 1.
For 最新价格, use latest eff_start_dt not later than the target date.

examples.question: 请统计2025年3月销售订单总数。
examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM fact_sales_order_hdr WHERE order_date_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331';

examples.question: 请统计2025年3月销售订单行的总订单数量。
examples.sql: SELECT SUM(l.order_qty) AS total_order_qty FROM fact_sales_order_hdr h JOIN fact_sales_order_line l ON h.sales_order_id = l.sales_order_id WHERE h.order_date_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331';

examples.question: 2025年3月总产量是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT SUM(good_qty) AS total_output_qty FROM fact_prod_output_dly WHERE output_dt_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331';

examples.question: 请统计2025年3月检验总数量和拒收总数量。
examples.sql: SELECT SUM(inspected_qty) AS total_inspected_qty, SUM(reject_qty) AS total_reject_qty FROM fact_qa_inspection WHERE inspection_dt_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331';

examples.question: 2025年第一季度哪个客户细分的有效订单数量最高？
examples.sql: SELECT c.cust_segment_cd, COUNT(DISTINCT h.sales_order_id) AS valid_order_count FROM fact_sales_order_hdr h JOIN code_sales_order_status s ON h.sales_order_status_cd = s.sales_order_status_cd JOIN dim_customer c ON h.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE h.order_date_key BETWEEN '20250101' AND '20250331' AND s.is_valid_order = 1 GROUP BY c.cust_segment_cd ORDER BY valid_order_count DESC LIMIT 1;

examples.question: 请找出2025年3月最新生效的智能控制器A100标准售价。
examples.sql: SELECT m.material_sku, m.material_nm, p.unit_price_amt, p.eff_start_dt FROM fact_price_book p JOIN dim_material m ON p.material_id = m.material_id WHERE m.material_sku = 'FG-A100' AND p.price_type_cd = 'STD' AND p.price_status_cd = 'ACTIVE' AND p.customer_id IS NULL AND p.eff_start_dt = (SELECT MAX(p2.eff_start_dt) FROM fact_price_book p2 WHERE p2.material_id = p.material_id AND p2.price_type_cd = 'STD' AND p2.price_status_cd = 'ACTIVE' AND p2.customer_id IS NULL AND p2.eff_start_dt <= '20250331');

examples.question: 颜色为红色且电压为220V的成品有哪些？请返回物料编码和名称。
examples.sql: SELECT m.material_sku, m.material_nm FROM dim_material m JOIN eav_material_attr color_attr ON m.material_id = color_attr.material_id JOIN eav_material_attr voltage_attr ON m.material_id = voltage_attr.material_id WHERE m.material_type_cd = 'FG' AND color_attr.attr_nm = 'color' AND lower(color_attr.attr_value) = 'red' AND voltage_attr.attr_nm = 'voltage' AND voltage_attr.attr_value = '220';

examples.question: 请计算智能控制器A100当前BOM版本中每生产1台需要多少个组件，并列出各组件用量。
examples.sql: SELECT c.material_id AS component_material_id, c.material_sku AS component_sku, c.material_nm AS component_name, b.component_qty AS component_qty_per_unit FROM dim_bom_hdr h JOIN dim_material p ON p.material_id = h.parent_material_id JOIN bridge_bom_component b ON b.bom_id = h.bom_id JOIN dim_material c ON c.material_id = b.component_material_id WHERE h.is_current_ver = 1 AND p.material_sku = 'FG-A100' ORDER BY b.bom_comp_id;

examples.question: 哪些销售订单在2025年3月被取消，但其订单行数量仍然大于100？请返回订单号和订单数量。
examples.sql: SELECT h.sales_order_id, SUM(l.order_qty) AS order_qty FROM fact_sales_order_hdr h JOIN fact_sales_order_line l ON h.sales_order_id = l.sales_order_id JOIN code_sales_order_status s ON h.sales_order_status_cd = s.sales_order_status_cd WHERE h.order_date_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331' AND s.sales_order_status_nm = '已取消' GROUP BY h.sales_order_id HAVING SUM(l.order_qty) > 100 ORDER BY order_qty DESC;

examples.question: 2025年3月各生产线总产量排名前3的是哪些？
examples.sql: WITH line_material_output AS (SELECT l.prod_line_nm, m.material_sku, m.material_nm, SUM(o.good_qty) AS total_output_qty FROM fact_prod_output_dly o JOIN dim_prod_line l ON o.prod_line_id = l.prod_line_id JOIN dim_material m ON o.material_id = m.material_id WHERE o.output_dt_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331' GROUP BY l.prod_line_nm, m.material_sku, m.material_nm), ranked AS (SELECT prod_line_nm, material_sku, material_nm, total_output_qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY prod_line_nm ORDER BY total_output_qty DESC) AS rn FROM line_material_output) SELECT prod_line_nm, material_sku, material_nm, total_output_qty, rn FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY prod_line_nm, rn;

examples.question: 与2025年2月相比，2025年3月产量增长最多的生产线是哪条，增长了多少？
examples.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT prod_line_id, substr(output_dt_key, 1, 6) AS month_key, SUM(good_qty) AS total_output_qty FROM fact_prod_output_dly WHERE output_dt_key BETWEEN '20250201' AND '20250331' GROUP BY prod_line_id, substr(output_dt_key, 1, 6)), pivoted AS (SELECT prod_line_id, SUM(CASE WHEN month_key = '202502' THEN total_output_qty ELSE 0 END) AS feb_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN month_key = '202503' THEN total_output_qty ELSE 0 END) AS mar_qty FROM monthly GROUP BY prod_line_id) SELECT l.prod_line_nm, mar_qty - feb_qty AS growth_qty FROM pivoted p JOIN dim_prod_line l ON p.prod_line_id = l.prod_line_id ORDER BY growth_qty DESC LIMIT 1;

examples.question: 请统计2025年一季度每个月的总产量，并计算月环比增量。
examples.sql: WITH monthly_output AS (SELECT substr(output_dt_key, 1, 6) AS month_key, SUM(good_qty) AS total_output_qty FROM fact_prod_output_dly WHERE output_dt_key BETWEEN '20250101' AND '20250331' GROUP BY substr(output_dt_key, 1, 6)) SELECT month_key, total_output_qty, total_output_qty - LAG(total_output_qty) OVER (ORDER BY month_key) AS mom_increment FROM monthly_output ORDER BY month_key;

examples.question: 请找出2025年3月检验中拒收率最高的检验单，并给出拒收率。
examples.sql: SELECT inspection_id, inspected_qty, reject_qty, 1.0 * reject_qty / NULLIF(inspected_qty, 0) AS reject_rate FROM fact_qa_inspection WHERE inspection_dt_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331' ORDER BY reject_rate DESC LIMIT 1;

examples.question: 在当前BOM中，哪些成品的组件数最多？请返回成品名称和组件数量前3名。
examples.sql: WITH component_count AS (SELECT p.material_nm AS parent_material_name, COUNT(*) AS component_count FROM dim_bom_hdr h JOIN dim_material p ON h.parent_material_id = p.material_id JOIN bridge_bom_component b ON h.bom_id = b.bom_id WHERE h.is_current_ver = 1 GROUP BY p.material_nm), ranked AS (SELECT parent_material_name, component_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY component_count DESC) AS rn FROM component_count) SELECT parent_material_name, component_count FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY rn;

examples.question: 2025年3月末哪个成品库存缺口最大？库存缺口定义为分厂预测量减去可用库存，其中可用库存=在手-已分配。
examples.sql: WITH forecast AS (SELECT material_id, plant_id, SUM(forecast_qty) AS forecast_qty FROM fact_forecast_mth WHERE month_key = '202503' GROUP BY material_id, plant_id), inventory AS (SELECT i.material_id, w.plant_id, SUM(i.on_hand_qty - i.alloc_qty) AS available_qty FROM fact_inv_balance_snap i JOIN dim_wh w ON i.wh_id = w.wh_id WHERE i.snap_dt_key = '20250331' GROUP BY i.material_id, w.plant_id), gap_by_plant AS (SELECT f.material_id, f.plant_id, f.forecast_qty - COALESCE(i.available_qty, 0) AS inventory_gap FROM forecast f LEFT JOIN inventory i ON f.material_id = i.material_id AND f.plant_id = i.plant_id), gap_by_material AS (SELECT material_id, SUM(inventory_gap) AS inventory_gap FROM gap_by_plant GROUP BY material_id) SELECT m.material_nm, g.inventory_gap FROM gap_by_material g JOIN dim_material m ON g.material_id = m.material_id WHERE m.material_type_cd = 'FG' ORDER BY g.inventory_gap DESC LIMIT 1;

examples.question: 2025年第一季度，每个月有效订单金额最高的客户是谁？请返回月份、客户名称和金额。
examples.sql: WITH customer_month_amt AS (SELECT substr(h.order_date_key, 1, 6) AS month_key, h.customer_id, SUM(l.net_amt) AS order_amt FROM fact_sales_order_hdr h JOIN fact_sales_order_line l ON h.sales_order_id = l.sales_order_id JOIN code_sales_order_status s ON h.sales_order_status_cd = s.sales_order_status_cd WHERE h.order_date_key BETWEEN '20250101' AND '20250331' AND s.is_valid_order = 1 GROUP BY substr(h.order_date_key, 1, 6), h.customer_id), ranked AS (SELECT month_key, customer_id, order_amt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY month_key ORDER BY order_amt DESC) AS rn FROM customer_month_amt) SELECT r.month_key, c.customer_nm, r.order_amt FROM ranked r JOIN dim_customer c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE r.rn = 1 ORDER BY r.month_key;

examples.question: 2025年3月，哪些供应商存在平均综合评分低于本月全体供应商平均值的情况？请返回供应商名称和综合评分。
examples.sql: WITH monthly_avg AS (SELECT AVG(score_total) AS avg_score FROM fact_supplier_score_mth WHERE month_key = '202503'), supplier_score AS (SELECT supplier_id, AVG(score_total) AS score_total FROM fact_supplier_score_mth WHERE month_key = '202503' GROUP BY supplier_id) SELECT s.supplier_nm, ss.score_total FROM supplier_score ss JOIN dim_supplier s ON ss.supplier_id = s.supplier_id CROSS JOIN monthly_avg ma WHERE ss.score_total < ma.avg_score ORDER BY ss.score_total ASC;

examples.question: 2025年3月，哪些售后案例仍未关闭且索赔金额超过当月售后案例平均索赔金额？请返回案例号和索赔金额。
examples.sql: WITH month_avg AS (SELECT AVG(claim_amt) AS avg_claim_amt FROM wide_after_sale_case WHERE open_dt_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331') SELECT case_id, claim_amt FROM wide_after_sale_case, month_avg WHERE open_dt_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331' AND case_status_cd <> 'CLOSED' AND claim_amt > avg_claim_amt ORDER BY claim_amt DESC;

examples.question: 2025年3月，每个客户细分中订单金额最高的物料系列是什么？请返回客户细分、物料系列和金额。
examples.sql: WITH seg_family_amt AS (SELECT c.cust_segment_cd, m.prod_family_cd, SUM(l.net_amt) AS order_amt FROM fact_sales_order_hdr h JOIN fact_sales_order_line l ON h.sales_order_id = l.sales_order_id JOIN code_sales_order_status s ON h.sales_order_status_cd = s.sales_order_status_cd JOIN dim_customer c ON h.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN dim_material m ON l.material_id = m.material_id WHERE h.order_date_key BETWEEN '20250301' AND '20250331' AND s.is_valid_order = 1 GROUP BY c.cust_segment_cd, m.prod_family_cd), ranked AS (SELECT cust_segment_cd, prod_family_cd, order_amt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cust_segment_cd ORDER BY order_amt DESC) AS rn FROM seg_family_amt) SELECT cust_segment_cd, prod_family_cd, order_amt FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY cust_segment_cd;
